# /generate

> The full auto pipeline. Runs end-to-end without human review per artifact (per [ADR-0007](../../../design/adr/0007-brownfield-auto-mode-self-healing.md)). On completion, the reviewer reads `gap-log.md` (the single review artefact) + `coverage-report.md`.

## Usage

```
/generate [--project <name>] [--skip-scan] [--skip-document]
```

- `--skip-scan` — reuse existing `inventory.json` (useful when iterating only on documentation passes)
- `--skip-document` — reuse existing per-artifact docs (useful when iterating on synthesis only)

## Pre-conditions

- `/prepare` exit-status 0 (no `MISSING-INPUT` blockers)

## Execution flow

```
1. /scan          → inventory.json + initial gap-log entries
2. /document      → per-artifact docs + gap-log entries for EXCEEDED-RETRY-LIMIT, BLOCKED-BY-BINARY, INFERENCE-LOW-CONFIDENCE
3. /fdd           → functional-overview.md
4. /tdd           → technical-overview.md
5. /blueprint     → inventory.md (synthesis) + solution-blueprint.md + integration-topology.md
6. /index         → docs-generated/00-index.md (master navigation)
7. write coverage-report.md (mechanical: counts of documented / gap-logged / module-skipped per category)
8. validate gap-log.json against schemas/brownfield-gap-log.v1.json
9. write gap-log.md (human-readable projection of gap-log.json)
10. /handoff      → publishes _brownfield/{inventory.json, gap-log.json, coverage-report.md} for domain agents
```

## Output

The complete `docs-generated/` tree under `projects/{p}/_brownfield/`:

```
docs-generated/
├── 00-index.md                          # master navigation
├── inventory.{json,md}                  # full inventory
├── functional/
│   └── functional-overview.md
├── technical/
│   ├── data-model/                      # per-entity docs
│   ├── code/                            # per-plugin, per-JS, per-X++ docs
│   ├── ui/                              # per-form, per-canvas-app, per-page docs
│   ├── processes/                       # per-flow, per-workflow, per-business-rule docs
│   ├── power-apps/                      # per-canvas-app deep docs
│   ├── power-pages/                     # per-page, per-template docs
│   ├── security/                        # per-role docs
│   ├── customer-service/                # module-gated
│   ├── sales/  marketing/  field-service/    # module-gated
│   ├── reference-data/                  # per config doc
│   ├── templates/                       # per email / Word / Excel template
│   └── audit-compliance/                # per audit-config doc
├── architecture/
│   ├── solution-blueprint.md
│   └── integration-topology.md
├── gap-log.{json,md}                    # the one artefact reviewers scan
└── coverage-report.md                   # documentation status per artifact
```

## Coverage guarantee

Every artefact in `inventory.json` is one of:
- (a) **Documented** + validators passed (row in coverage-report)
- (b) **Gap-logged** with typed category (row in gap-log)
- (c) **Module-gated** silent-skip (row in coverage-report under `module-skipped`)

`validate_inventory_coverage` enforces this at the end of the pipeline. Any artifact silently missing is itself a gap-log entry of `severity: blocker`.
